tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all available image and video generation models with current per-unit USD prices, supported resolutions, durations and constraints. Prices come from the same source as the website — call this before quoting costs to a user or choosing a model. Free, no charge.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get the current account balance (USD), this API key's name, optional daily spend cap and how much of it is used today. Free, no charge. Use it to check affordability before starting expensive generations.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Start an AI image generation (Google Nano Banana family). Charges the account balance immediately and returns a job_id — poll get_result for the finished image URLs. Typical completion: 10–60 seconds. Costs $0.03–$0.20 per image depending on model and resolution (see list_models). Failed generations

tools.name: edit_image
tools.description: Edit / refine a previously generated image with a text instruction (multi-turn editing: change colors, remove objects, restyle, etc.). Pass the job_id of a COMPLETED image generation as source_generation_id. Charged like a single image of the chosen model/resolution; auto-refund on failure. Example:

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Start an AI video generation (Google Veo 3.1 family or Gemini Omni Flash). EXPENSIVE: $0.10–$4.40 per clip. Cost confirmation is mandatory: the first call always returns a USD quote and charges nothing — repeat the call with confirm_cost set to the quoted amount to actually start. Returns a job_id;

tools.name: get_result
tools.description: Get the status and result of a generation job started with generate_image / edit_image / generate_video. Waits up to wait_seconds for completion before returning (long-poll). On success returns hosted media URLs (valid 24 h — call again for fresh links), cost_charged_usd and balance_remaining_usd, p

tools.name: list_generations
tools.description: List this account's recent generations (both MCP and website) — id, type, model, status, cost and prompt preview. Use it to find a job_id to re-download results or to pick a source for edit_image. Free, no charge.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "generate_video" stacks urgency/override words (always, mandatory). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
